scripts.health:all: for port in 8080 8081 8082 8083 8084 8085 8086 8087 8088; do echo -n "Port $port: " && curl -sf http://localhost:$port/health && echo || echo UNREACHABLE; done
scripts.generate:types: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/v3/api-docs -o /tmp/kl-auth.json && curl -sf http://localhost:8082/v3/api-docs -o /tmp/kl-inventory.json && curl -sf http://localhost:8083/v3/api-docs -o /tmp/kl-finance.json && curl -sf http://localhost:8088/v3/api-docs -o /tmp/kl-staff.json && npx --yes openapi-typescript /tmp/kl-auth.json -o packages/types/src/generated/auth.d.ts && npx openapi-typescript /tmp/kl-inventory.json -o packages/types/src/generated/inventory.d.ts && npx openapi-typescript /tmp/kl-finance.json -o packages/types/src/generated/finance.d.ts && npx openapi-typescript /tmp/kl-staff.json -o packages/types/src/generated/staff.d.ts && echo 'Types generated in packages/types/src/generated/'
